name: the drafter emits the Layer-A drafting prompt that demands every clause be translated or flagged
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/draft-custom-rule.sh" --rule-id g-z --tool eslint --prose 'Never use var.' --json > d.json 2>/dev/null; node -e 'const d=require(process.cwd()+"/d.json");if(!/do not silently drop any clause/i.test(d.layer_a_prompt))process.exit(1)' && echo layer-a-prompt 1>&2
